text:
Korean pharmacist rates dark spot serums honestly 🇰🇷
No ads, no sponsorship. Just honest reviews
1.BOJ Glow Serum: 1/10
60% propolis, only 2% niacinamide
Not a real dark spot serum, and even for glow this is too weak
Nowadays 5% is the bare minimum
2.Goodal Vita-C: 2/10
5% niacinamide and vitamin C, but still too gentle for dark spots
Fine for daily use and sebum control, good for acne too
Just not strong enough to actually treat dark spots
3.AXIS-Y Dark Spot Serum: 3/10
5% niacinamide and squalane, gentle but too weak
Niacinamide controls sebum, squalane mimics natural skin oil
An odd combination for a dark spot serum
4.Dr Althea Vitamin C Serum: 6/10
5% niacinamide, 2% TXA, and alpha arbutin
Better combo, more targeted
5.Jumiso Niacinamide 20: 7/10
20% niacinamide with TXA, powerful but can irritate
Fine if diluted, but using it at full strength is not well supported by evidence
Niacinamide up to 10% has very strong clinical backing, beyond that the evidence drops off
6.Anua Niacinamide 10 TXA 4: 10/10
10% niacinamide, 4% TXA, plus arbutin
My actual pick. Smart formula, and the scent is not bad at all
For more skin tips, follow me 👇
#kbeauty #darkspots #hyperpigmentation #niacinamide #oliveyoung

text:
No sponsorship. Just what actually works 💊

All fragrance-free. No essential oils.

🧴 Cleanser — Etude SoonJung pH 6.5 Whip Cleanser
Low PH. Amino acid surfactant. Fragrance-free. Nothing unnecessary.
Gentle enough for already damaged acne skin.

🚫 Toner — You don't need one.
Your cleanser is low-pH. Active serum handles the rest.

💧 Serum — Anua Azelaic Acid 10% Hyaluron Soothing Serum
Azelaic acid 10% — clinically proven for acne, redness, and dark spots.
Concentration clearly disclosed.

🌿 Moisturizer — Purito Mighty Bamboo Panthenol Cream
Panthenol 10% disclosed. Gel-type cream. Non-comedogenic tested.

☀️ Sunscreen — Purito Daily Soft Touch SPF 50+ PA++++
5 ceramides + centella + panthenol with no fragrance, no essential oils.

🫧 Cleansing Oil (PM) — Dear Klairs Gentle Black Fresh
This was the only one I found with zero fragrance, zero essential oils, and zero pore-clogging risk. All oils comedogenic 0-1.

📌 This is just an example — not the only routine. Skip what you don't need.

Depending on your skin, you can also consider: 

→ Niacinamide (2-5%) for sebum control and brightening 

→ BHA for deeper pore cleansing (alternate nights with serum) 

Start one at a time.
Watch how your skin responds.

Drop your questions or opinion in the comments 👇
If this helped, follow me.💊

text:
ĐỘT QUỴ IKSU ĐỎ HÀNG NỘI ĐỊA HÀN
BAO CHUẨN TỪNG VIÊN

🍀Công dụng:
- Giúp ngăn ngừa hiện tượng chảy máu não, xuất huyết não phục hồi hệ thần kinh chức năng cho những bệnh nhân mới và những bênh nhân đã bị tai biến mạch máu não lâu ngày… phục hồi các chức năng do di chứng để lại sau khi bị tai biếm mạch máu não như bán thân bất toại (liệt nửa người), rối loạn chức năng diễn đạt ngôn ngữ…
- Chữa trị chứng đột quỵ (chứng xuất huyết não, liệt toàn thân, liệt tay chân, khiếm khuyết về ngôn ngữ, khó nuốt, hôn mê, tâm thần, chứng tê liệt ở mặt), cao huyết áp, tim đập nhanh, hô hấp khó, tinh thần bất an, đau co giật cấp và mãn tính, rối loạn thần kinh thực vật, bất tỉnh nhân sự……
- Phòng chống và điều trị các bệnh về cao huyết áp và tai biến mach máu não, tim đập nhanh, Ích khí dưỡng huyết trấn kinh an thần hóa đờm trị phong, cho các bệnh do khí huyết không đầy đủ, hỏa khí trong người vượng, đờm nhiệt gây nên tức ngực khó thở nhức đầu hoa mắt đi lại nói năng khó khăn, đàu óc không tỉnh táo.
🍀Đối tượng sử dụng:
- Biến chứng do tai biến mạch máu não như: đờm ứ trệ gây khó thở, tê liệt cơ mặt, rối loạn ngôn ngữ.
- Người tim đập nhanh, rối loạn thần kinh thực vật.
- Người bị rối loạn tiền đình, suy giảm trí nhớ.
- Người cao tuổi hoặc người làm việc trí óc căng thẳng.
🍀Cách dùng: Nhai và uống với nước ấm.
